title: Finding
description: A single evaluation finding produced by the AI-assisted PR evaluation pipeline. All pipeline-generated findings must conform to this schema. Findings are committed to the audit log of the target repository at merge time as a durable forensic record.

findingId.description: UUID identifying this finding, generated by the pipeline.

standardId.description: The ID of the standard that was violated, e.g. "STD-001".

severity.description: Severity taken directly from the violated standard.

file.description: Path of the offending file relative to the repository root, or null if it cannot be determined.

lineRange.description: The line range within the file where the violation occurs, or null if it cannot be determined.

description.description: A one-sentence description of the violation.

disposition.description: Current handling state of the finding.

dismissalReason.description: Reason the finding was dismissed. Required when disposition is "dismissed"; otherwise null.

evaluatorModel.description: The model used to evaluate the PR, e.g. "gpt-4o".

evaluatorVersion.description: Pipeline-injected git ref of poc-ai-governance-standards that was active at evaluation time.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the finding was produced.

prNumber.description: The number of the pull request that was evaluated.

commitSha.description: The commit SHA of the pull request head that was evaluated.
